title: More (Fishing) Rod Variants (MStV+)
description: (Fishing) Rods for every kind of wood - A 'More Stick Variants' Add-On
body: [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Stick-Variants/badge/requires-mstv.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants)           Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Fishing-Rod-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) ## More (Fishing) Rod Variants Fishing and riding Pigs or Striders - but the way you want! What _Stick_ you attach _String_ to and maybe a _Carrot_ or a _Warped Fungus_ - Now it's **your** decision! ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Fishing-Rod-Variants/pres/mr_desc_banner.png) A scene at the beach displaying several of the newly added _Fishing Rod_ and _Carrot/Warped Fungus on a Stick_ items using '[More Armor Stand Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-armor-stand-variants/)' and '[Armor Stands](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-stands)' (for set-up) by [roundaround](https://modrinth.com/user/Roundaround). ### Adding 11 new _Fishing Rods_, 11 new _Carrot on a Stick_ Items and 11 new _Warped Fungus on a Stick_ Items to Minecraft. ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Fishing-Rod-Variants/pres/mr_desc_pres_banner.png) --- ### [![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/zear1.png)  Pale Oak textures by **_hunnycakehorse_**](https://modrinth.com/user/hunnycakehorse) --- ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/mgu0q.gif)**]()
